description: SDXL 1.0 + IKEA Instructions LoRA — flat line-art assembly-manual style
_comment: LoRA by ostris. Trained on IKEA-style flat-pack instruction illustrations.
_comment_trigger: No trigger word needed. SDXL figures out the steps from a simple subject prompt.
_comment_prompt: Use simple nouns or short descriptions: 'hamburger', 'a dog', 'back to the future'.
_comment_negative: Negatives usually not needed; 'blurry, low quality' can help if output is soft.
_comment_steps: 30 steps at CFG 7.5 is the recommended starting point per the model card.
_comment_cfg: CFG 5–8. The model card examples use 7.5; lower values give softer lines.
_comment_scale: lora_scale 1.0 gives the strongest IKEA style effect per model card.
